title: Prime Number of Set Bits in Binary Representation
titleCn: 二进制表示中质数个计算置位

testcases.input: left = 6, right = 10 Output: 4 Explanation: 6 -> 110 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 7 -> 111 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 8 -> 1000 (1 set bit, 1 is not prime) 9 -> 1001 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 10 -> 1010 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 4 numbers have a prime number of set bits.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: 6 -> 110 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 7 -> 111 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 8 -> 1000 (1 set bit, 1 is not prime) 9 -> 1001 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 10 -> 1010 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 4 numbers have a prime number of set bits.

testcases.input: left = 10, right = 15 Output: 5 Explanation: 10 -> 1010 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 11 -> 1011 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 12 -> 1100 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 13 -> 1101 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 14 -> 1110 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 15 -> 1111 (4 set bits, 4 is not prime) 5 numbers have a prime number of set bits.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: 10 -> 1010 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 11 -> 1011 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 12 -> 1100 (2 set bits, 2 is prime) 13 -> 1101 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 14 -> 1110 (3 set bits, 3 is prime) 15 -> 1111 (4 set bits, 4 is not prime) 5 numbers have a prime number of set bits.
